name: Wellness
description: A serene, soft wellness system for yoga, spa, and studio brands: warm cream canvas, a calm sage-green accent, generous whitespace, and large rounded forms. A full studio page chain from navbar to footer.
whenToUse: Pick for calm, restorative brands: yoga and pilates studios, spas, meditation and breathwork practices, retreats, wellness coaches, and holistic clinics. The chain is a complete studio narrative — soft navbar, spacious hero, class offerings, a philosophy image-text, a weekly schedule, membership tiers, a warm member quote, a gentle closing CTA, and a footer with hours and location. The look is light and airy with a muted sage accent, large pill-soft radii, and an elegant serif paired with a humanist sans — it reads as tranquil and human, not corporate. Avoid for high-energy commerce, dense dashboards, dark dramatic decks, or hard-edged tech products.
